source: AETHER + Public RSS (arXiv, Hugging Face, MarkTechPost, Ben's Bites)

articles.title: A Coding Implementation on Spatial Graph Neural Networks for Urban Function Inference Using city2graph, OSMnx, and PyTorch Geometric
articles.excerpt: We build an end-to-end spatial graph learning pipeline using city2graph.  We collect urban POI and street network data from OpenStreetMap, with a synthetic fallback for reliability

articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Google Releases Gemini-SQL2: Gemini 3.1 Pro Text-to-SQL Scores 80.04% on BIRD Single-Model Leaderboard
articles.excerpt: We look at Gemini-SQL2, the text-to-SQL capability Google Research announced on June 12, 2026. 04% execution accuracy on the BIRD single-model leaderboard

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.

articles.title: Moonshot AI Launches Kimi Work, a Local Desktop Agent Reportedly Running on Kimi K2.6 With a 300-Sub-Agent Agent Swarm
articles.excerpt: Moonshot AI's Kimi Work is a local desktop agent for macOS and Windows.  It runs a 300-sub-agent swarm, drives your logged-in browser via WebBridge, and schedules background jobs

articles.title: Zyphra Release Zamba2-VL: Hybrid Mamba2–Transformer Vision-Language Models That Cut Time-to-First-Token by About an Order of Magnitude
articles.excerpt: Zyphra has released Zamba2-VL, a family of open vision-language models at 1. 7B, and 7B parameters

articles.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
